CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-12-2014 Off Calendar

Joint Notice Of Motion And Motion For Approval Of Proposed Paga Penalties Pursuant To Penal Code Section 2699, Subdivision (L)
Off Calendar Sep-25-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Joint Motion For Approval Of Proposed Paga Penalties Pursuant To Penal Code Section 2699, Subdivision (L)
is Granted. No opposition filed and the motion meets the requirements of the Labor Code.
ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sheryl L. Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/eg
